title: 夢の大舞台　春の天皇賞

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As the Spring Tenno Sho draws ever closer, Mejiro McQueen's
training regimen intensifies.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant, pant... I believe I'm getting better at controlling my breathing.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Well, that brings us to the end of today's regimen. Do you have
anything else for me?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Just letting you know, I still have plenty of energy left.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It does look like a little more wouldn't hurt today. I'll let her do as she
wishes.
choice_data_list: All right, let's have another go at it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It does look like a little more wouldn't hurt today. I'll let her do as she
wishes.
choice_data_list: All right, let's have another go at it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Hehe, of course. It's much too early to be stopping today.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Off I go, then!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Strangely enough, this feels as if McQueen and I are truly training together for the first time since I took over the team.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I suppose it helps to share a singular goal to work toward.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I suppose it helps to share a singular goal to work toward.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Hey there, Trainer! McQueen's lookin' better than ever!

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: Hi, Ryan.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: Hi, Ryan.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ryan smiles brightly, like a weight's been lifted off her
shoulders.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
McQueen's improved mood is without a doubt thanks to Ryan's
advice.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Now that my rival's back in the game, it looks like I've gotta crank my
own spring Tenno Sho prep work up to 200%!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Heheh, don't mention it! Man, I sure am glad I was able to talk to you
about it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Really lookin' forward to race day. But just know that I'll be the one
takin' home that win!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The spring Tenno Sho is shaping up to be a race we won't soon
forget. I need to make sure that McQueen's in top condition.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The spring Tenno Sho is shaping up to be a race we won't soon
forget. I need to make sure that McQueen's in top condition.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The next few days fly by in a flash. The day of the spring Tenno Sho
is upon us.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: What are you thinking of eating after your win?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Hm? Ah, yes. Well... Since we're in Kyoto, maybe some Kyoto cuisine.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: Sounds... good.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Trainer... You are abysmal at lightening the mood.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: Seems that way...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Come now, get it together. That's something that you should have a
handle on as a trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I'm starting to become worried that those frazzled nerves will rub off
onto me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It's times like these that I wish I had my mentor's sociable personality.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I may not be very good at helping my trainee relax, but...
choice_data_list: I'll cheer you on twice as loud to make up for it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I may not be very good at helping my trainee relax, but...
choice_data_list: I'll cheer you on twice as loud to make up for it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Hehe... Yes, please do.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
My dream lies in wait right before my very eyes. All that's left is to go
out there and grab it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Thank you! I'll be coming back with trophy in hand!
